verses.text: Pasian' biakna tau, Jerusalem khuapi, David in a sat khuapi, a sia ding hita hi. Kumte, a banbanin paipai sak un la, pawite zong a ngeina bangin kot paipai sak un
Ahih hangin keimah in “Pasian biakna tau,” a kici tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Thumna leh tauna om ding a, tua khuapi pen biakna halna biakna tau suak ding hi
Na kimkotah hong umcihin tausangpite tawh kong um ding a, nangmah umcihna ding dum ka bawl ding hi

Tua ciangin leithuk sung panin nang na pau ding a, a niamna mun leisung panin nangma kammal hong ging ding hi. Nangma aw pen leisung panin sikha' aw bangin hong ging ding a, na thugenna pen leisung panin hong phun suausuau ding hi
Ahih hangin nangma gal honpite leivuineel leeng bang ding uh a, thukhuallo mihonpite ansi leeng bang ding uh hi. Tua ciangin tomkha sungin thakhat thu-in
Vanglian Topa in vanging, zinling, a ging lianpi, pingpei leh huihpi, leh a kangtum thei meikuang tawh nang hong hon ding hi
Tua ciangin Pasian biakna tau a do minam honpite khempeuh, tua khuapi leh a kulhpi simin a lungkhamsakte khempeuh, zana mangmat tawh kibangin maimang ding uh hi

A gilkial mipa in a mangin an ne a, a khan'lawh ciangin a gil a vah tuanlo, a dangtak mipa in a mangin tui dawn a, a dangtak pha tuanloin a gim mahmahin a khan'lawh mah bangin Jerusalem khuapi a do mi khempeuh zong tuaci ding uh hi.
Lamdang kisasak un la lamdang a sa hi un! Kimittawsak un la a mittaw hi un! Leenggahzu a dawn lopi-in a zukham hi un la, khamtheihzu a ne lopi-in hoi un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in note' sungah ihmut nopna lungsim hong guan' a, amau' mit ahi kamsangte mitsi sakin amau' lutang ahi thu mutheite khuhcip hi

Hih maangmuhnate khempeuh pen note-a' dingin ahih leh a kimatcip laibu sunga thu om tawh a kibang a suak hi. Mite in lai a sim theipa khat tungah, “Hih lai sim dih in,” a cih ciangin amah in, “Kimatcip ahih manin ka sim thei kei hi,” ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute in lai a sim theilopa kiangah, “Hih lai sim dih in,” a cih uh ciangin amah in, “Ka sim thei kei hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Topa in, “Amaute' lungsim kei tawh kigamla napi-in hih mite in a kam uh tawh kei kiangah hong pai uh a, a muk uh tawh kei hong pahtawi-in, amaute in kei hong kihtakna pen mihingte' thupiak a zuihna uh ahi lel hi

Tua ahih ciangin en un, hih mite tungah a tumdang leh a lamdang ahi a lamdang nate ka bawlkik ding hi. Amau' mipilte' pilna kisia ding a, amau' thu mutheite' thu muhtel theihna kiseel ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa' kiang panin amau' thuvaihawmna a selcip, khuamial sungah a gamta, “Kua in hong mu ding hiam? Kua in hong thei ding hiam?” a cite in gimna ngah ta hen

Note in na khempeuh a lehlamin na koih uh hi. Beelsekpa pen tungman bangin kingaihsun ding a, a kibawlsa na in a bawlpa tungah, “Amah in kei hong bawllo hi,” ci ding ahi hiam? A kipiangsak na in a piangsakpa tungah, “Amah in theihna nei kei,” ci ding ahi hiam?
Lebanon mual pen singno lo hoih suakin, singno lo hoih pen tulak a suahna ding hun tomno sung bek hilo ahi hiam
Tua ni ciangin bilngongte in laibu sunga thute za ding a, lungzin'na leh khuamialna sung panin mittawte' mit in mu ding uh hi
Mi' nopnehte in Topa' sungah lungdamna thak ngah ding uh a, Israel-te' Siangtho Pa' sungah mizawngte lungdam ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh kampauna tawh a khialhna dingun mite bawlin, kongpi sungah mi a thuhilhpa thang siahin, a thuman mipa pen zuauthu tawh a heikhia, thukhuallo mite a mawkna suakin, mi a thusimlo mite bei-in, siatna hih ding a sawm mite khempeuh kisusia ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin Abraham a honkhia Topa in Jakob innkuan tawh kisai thu a genin-ah: “Jakob maizum nawnlo ding a, a mai khing nawnlo ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh keima khut tawh ka bawlsa amau' tate a muh uh ciangin amaute in keima min hong phat ding uh hi. Amaute in Jakob' Siangtho Pa, a siangtho ahihna phawk ding uh a, Israel Pasian zahtakin kihta ding uh hi
Lungzingin a khial mite in thu theitel ta ding uh a, a phunphun mite in thuhilhna ngai ta ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
